ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., ACTIVE, COMPLETED, CANCELLED) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was processed */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plan associated with the transaction */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., NEW, RENEWAL) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction in dollars */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., CASH, CARD) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date payment was made */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the transaction */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the transaction */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_payment_method FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_contract_type FOREIGN KEY ("contract_type") REFERENCES contract_types ("contract_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  "address_line_1" TEXT /* Address line 1 of the store */,
  "address_line_2" TEXT /* Address line 2 of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the store is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the store is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plan */,
  "discount_rate" REAL /* Discount rate associated with the plan */,
  "monthly_fee" REAL /* Monthly fee associated with the plan */,
  "annual_fee" REAL /* Annual fee associated with the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_types" (
  "contract_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract type */,
  "contract_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the contract type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contract type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_status_history" (
  "transaction_status_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction status history */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Reference to the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_status_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_status_history_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., STORE_MANAGER, CORPORATE_EXECUTIVE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the store where the transaction occurred
Status of the transaction (e.g., ACTIVE, COMPLETED, CANCELLED)
Reference to the plan associated with the transaction
Amount of the transaction in dollars
User who last updated the transaction
Date the transaction was last updated
City where the store is located
State where the store is located
Discount rate associated with the plan
Monthly fee associated with the plan
Annual fee associated with the plan
Unique identifier for each contract type
Unique identifier for each payment method
Unique identifier for each transaction status history
Date the transaction status was updated
Role of the user (e.g., STORE_MANAGER, CORPORATE_EXECUTIVE)
